privileged_info_summary: The task 'convert_to_multi_module@1' works with a synthetic Maven project named 'java-library' located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/java-library. The project contains three independently designed components: MathUtils in package com.library.math (based on Knuth and Sedgewick textbook patterns), StringUtils in package com.library.strings (adapted from Apache Commons Lang with Apache 2.0 license), and SimpleStack in package com.library.collections (based on Sedgewick & Wayne's Algorithms 4e). The task requires converting this single-module Maven project into a multi-module build with three submodules named 'math', 'strings', and 'collections', each with corresponding package mappings.
